abstract.text: Location Indicator layer.
Interactive, thoroughly customizable maps for iOS powered by vector tiles and Metal.
Parameters that define the current camera position for a
function.
A filled polygon with an optional stroked border.
Transition options for
Transition property for
The displacement off the center of the top image and the shadow image when the pitch of the map is greater than 0. This helps producing a three-dimensional appearence.
Default value: “0”.
Raster map textures such as satellite imagery.
A style’s fog property is a global effect that improves depth perception by fading out distant objects.
The size of the top image, as a scale factor applied to the size of the specified image.
Default value: 1.
The color for drawing the accuracy radius, as a circle. To adjust transparency, set the alpha component of the color accordingly.
Default value: “#ffffff”.
Transition property for
The accuracy, in meters, of the position source used to retrieve the position of the location indicator.
Default value: 0.
The maximum zoom level for the layer. At zoom levels equal to or greater than the maxzoom, the layer will be hidden.
The color for drawing the accuracy radius, as a circle. To adjust transparency, set the alpha component of the color accordingly.
Default value: “#ffffff”.
Particle animation driven by textures such as wind maps.
The size of the shadow image, as a scale factor applied to the size of the specified image.
Default value: 1.
The minimum zoom level for the layer. At zoom levels less than the minzoom, the layer will be hidden.
Interface for hosting a custom map style layer.
The displacement off the center of the top image and the shadow image when the pitch of the map is greater than 0. This helps producing a three-dimensional appearence.
Default value: “0”.
A stroked line.
Transition options for
Transition property for
The size of the top image, as a scale factor applied to the size of the specified image.
Default value: 1.

Specifies a glow effect range of the emphasis circle, in pixels. If [0,0] values are provided, it renders the circle as a solid color. The first value specifies the start of the glow effect where it is equal to the circle’s color, the second is the end, where it’s fully transparent. Between the two values the effect is linearly faded out.
Default value: [0,0].
The size of the bearing image, as a scale factor applied to the size of the specified image.
Default value: 1.
Transition property for
The slot this layer is assigned to.
If specified, and a slot with that name exists, it will be placed at that position in the layer order.
Note! This is an experimental feature. It can be changed or removed in future versions.
A pre-specified location in the style where layer will be added to
(such as on top of existing land layers, but below all labels).
Layer with custom rendering implementation
The color for drawing the accuracy radius border. To adjust transparency, set the alpha component of the color accordingly.
Default value: “#ffffff”.
A layer to render 3D Models.
Transition options for
The color for drawing the accuracy radius, as a circle. To adjust transparency, set the alpha component of the color accordingly.
Default value: “#ffffff”.
Location Indicator layer.

Specifies a glow effect range of the emphasis circle, in pixels. If [0,0] values are provided, it renders the circle as a solid color. The first value specifies the start of the glow effect where it is equal to the circle’s color, the second is the end, where it’s fully transparent. Between the two values the effect is linearly faded out.
Default value: [0,0].
A filled circle.
Layer types that will also be removed if fallen below this clip layer.
The maximum zoom level for the layer. At zoom levels equal to or greater than the maxzoom, the layer will be hidden.

Name of image in sprite to use as the middle of the location indicator.
The color of the circle emphasizing the indicator. To adjust transparency, set the alpha component of the color accordingly.
Default value: “#ffffff”.
Whether this layer is displayed.
Name of image in sprite to use as the background of the location indicator.

Marks the position of a slot.

Specifies a glow effect range of the emphasis circle, in pixels. If [0,0] values are provided, it renders the circle as a solid color. The first value specifies the start of the glow effect where it is equal to the circle’s color, the second is the end, where it’s fully transparent. Between the two values the effect is linearly faded out.
Default value: [0,0].

The accuracy, in meters, of the position source used to retrieve the position of the location indicator.
Default value: 0.
The bearing of the location indicator. Values under 0.01 degree variation are ignored.
Default value: 0.

Interface that provides access to elevation data.
The minimum zoom level for the layer. At zoom levels less than the minzoom, the layer will be hidden.
Transition options for
Client-side hillshading visualization based on DEM data. Currently, the implementation only supports Mapbox Terrain RGB and Mapzen Terrarium tiles.
Transition property for
The color for drawing the accuracy radius, as a circle. To adjust transparency, set the alpha component of the color accordingly.
Default value: “#ffffff”.
The color for drawing the accuracy radius border. To adjust transparency, set the alpha component of the color accordingly.
Default value: “#ffffff”.
Transition options for
A spherical dome around the map that is always rendered behind all other layers.
Warning: As of v10.6.0,
is the preferred method for atmospheric styling. Sky layer is not supported by the globe projection, and will be phased out in future major release.
The radius, in pixel, of the circle emphasizing the indicator, drawn between the accuracy radius and the indicator shadow.
Default value: 0.
Transition property for
The bearing of the location indicator. Values under 0.01 degree variation are ignored.
Default value: 0.
The color for drawing the accuracy radius border. To adjust transparency, set the alpha component of the color accordingly.
Default value: “#ffffff”.
The background color or pattern of the map.
Transition property for
Unique layer name
An array of [latitude, longitude, altitude] position of the location indicator. Values under 0.000001 variation are ignored.
Default value: [0,0,0].
Rendering type of this layer.

The amount of the perspective compensation, between 0 and 1. A value of 1 produces a location indicator of constant width across the screen. A value of 0 makes it scale naturally according to the viewing projection.
Default value: “0.85”.

The opacity of the entire location indicator layer.
Default value: 1. Value range: [0, 1]
The size of the shadow image, as a scale factor applied to the size of the specified image.
Default value: 1.

Default value: “0”.
